reason: Previously `q` was parsed as any integer; strings like `2024Q99` parsed cleanly and `time.Date` silently normalized `month := (q-1)*3+1 = 295` into a date range in roughly year 2048 rather than returning an empty range. Added an explicit range guard that returns `periodRange{}` for out-of-range quarters, matching the function's existing return-zero-on-invalid pattern.
